title: Rust/Zephyr: Missing gradient table
description: Python has gradient.py (181 LoC) providing GradientTable for unified route lookup. Neither Rust nor Zephyr have equivalent. Required for hybrid router integration. Reference: python/src/lichen/gradient.py
close_reason: Both Rust and Zephyr gradient tables already existed but were not properly integrated. Fixed: (1) Rust: exported gradient module in lib.rs with public types GradientEntry, GradientSource, GeoCoords, GradientTable, (2) Zephyr: added gradient.c to CMakeLists.txt, added CONFIG_LICHEN_ROUTING_GRADIENT_* options to Kconfig. Both implementations have complete functionality matching Python: LRU eviction, RFC 1982 seq comparison, priority-based replacement, expiry handling, coords support.
